creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Sat Aug 25 06:25:11 2012
New Revision: 303117
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303117

Log:
  - adopt optionsNG for DOCS
  
  PR:	170727
  Submitted by:	maintainer, nemysis@gmx.ch

Modified:
  head/games/impossible_mission_puzzle/Makefile   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/games/impossible_mission_puzzle/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/impossible_mission_puzzle/Makefile	Sat Aug 25 06:22:11 2012	(r303116)
+++ head/games/impossible_mission_puzzle/Makefile	Sat Aug 25 06:25:11 2012	(r303117)
@@ -26,6 +26,8 @@ PLIST_FILES=	bin/impossible_mission_puzz
 
 PORTDOCS=	README
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
 do-build:
 	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${CC} -o ${PORTNAME} ${CFLAGS} \
 	`${SDL_CONFIG} --cflags --libs` puzzle.c
@@ -35,7 +37,7 @@ do-install:
 	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/bin
 
 # Documentation
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
